creator: dweimer@dweimer.net
text: I get that this is a known conflict and even documented. Is this patch to fix it being worked on? I saw the announcement and was looking forward to getting my Samba AD Domain upgraded to 2016 function level supported on 4.19. But I also use FreeRadius3 to provide radius authentication, which of course requires talloc. Can't imagine I am only one using Samba for AD with FreeRadius.
